title: D002: Implement OpenBao deployment and secret management
summary: Review #8 covers the response to external review #7 by greptile-apps[bot]. Four fixes were applied: (1) VAULT_SKIP_VERIFY replaced with VAULT_CACERT across all exec wrappers for proper TLS verification, (2) base64 -w 0 replaced with base64 | tr -d '\n' for cross-platform compatibility, (3) NOTE comment added to setup-auth.sh explaining deferred auth config for non-management clusters, (4) kv_path passed via BAO_KV_PATH env var instead of shell interpolation to prevent injection. All code changes are correct and complete within the changed files. However, the VAULT_SKIP_VERIFY → VAULT_CACERT rename was not propagated to the reference documentation (docs/reference/infrastructure/openbao-bootstrap.md:160) or the pattern file (.planwerk/patterns/in-pod-secret-generation-to-avoid-host-process-listing-exposure.md:24), leaving stale references.

tests_checklist.item: V1-V3: Not applicable — shell scripts, no pytest/mypy/ruff
No VAULT_SKIP_VERIFY references remain in bootstrap scripts
No GNU-only base64 flags remain in bootstrap scripts
VAULT_CACERT is consistently propagated across all exec wrappers (6 locations)

code_quality_checklist.item: Q7: No dead code (VAULT_SKIP_VERIFY fully removed from scripts)

security_checklist.item: S1: TLS verification now uses CA cert instead of skip-verify
S2: Shell injection in sh -c mitigated via BAO_KV_PATH env var
S5: BAO_TOKEN exposure via env/cmdline documented with TODO

architecture_checklist.item: Changes are minimal and scoped to external reviewer feedback
VAULT_CACERT path /openbao/tls/ca.crt matches cert-manager Secret mount point

fail_fast_checklist.item: set -euo pipefail still present in all scripts

defensive_checklist.item: base64 | tr -d '\n' handles both GNU and BSD output formats

issues_found.description: docs/reference/infrastructure/openbao-bootstrap.md:160 still references `VAULT_SKIP_VERIFY=true` in the Internal Script Variables table. The code now uses `VAULT_CACERT=/openbao/tls/ca.crt`. This matches the external review pattern 'Update documentation when referenced code behavior changes'.
issues_found.fix: Update the table row from `| VAULT_SKIP_VERIFY | true | Skip TLS verification for self-signed certificate |` to `| VAULT_CACERT | /openbao/tls/ca.crt | CA certificate path for TLS verification |`

issues_found.description: .planwerk/patterns/in-pod-secret-generation-to-avoid-host-process-listing-exposure.md contains stale code examples: line 24 references VAULT_SKIP_VERIFY and lines 23-25 show the old sh -c pattern without the BAO_KV_PATH env var fix. Pattern examples should reflect current code.
issues_found.fix: Update the second example to show the current code: `env BAO_ADDR="${BAO_ADDR}" BAO_TOKEN="${BAO_TOKEN}" VAULT_CACERT="${VAULT_CACERT}" BAO_KV_PATH="${kv_path}" sh -c "bao kv put \"\${BAO_KV_PATH}\" ${put_args}"`

next_steps: Update docs/reference/infrastructure/openbao-bootstrap.md:160 to replace VAULT_SKIP_VERIFY with VAULT_CACERT
Update .planwerk/patterns/in-pod-secret-generation-to-avoid-host-process-listing-exposure.md examples to match current code
